summary: Tasks & Requests Module-Based Department Filter Feature - All 9 features tested and PASSED. The Tasks page correctly defaults the department filter based on the current module context (Sales, Production, Distribution, Marketing). New task form also defaults department to current module's department. Manual department filter change works correctly.

issues: Console warning: A props object containing a 'key' prop is being spread into JSX for MetricCard component - minor React warning, not affecting functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tasks & Requests page module-based department filtering fully tested. Key implementation details: 1) MODULE_DEPT_MAP in TaskManagement.js maps module context to department name (sales->Sales, production->Production, distribution->Distribution, marketing->Marketing). 2) useEffect triggers on contextDept change to update allFilters.department_ids. 3) resetTaskForm() sets department_id to contextDept for new tasks. 4) DeptMultiSelect component (data-testid='task-dept-multi-filter') shows current department filter. 5) Module selector (data-testid='module-selector') in sidebar allows switching between modules. 6) Tasks page URL is /tasks (same for all modules).

Tasks_page_loads_from_any_module.details: Tasks page loads at /tasks from Sales, Production, Distribution, and Marketing modules

My_Tasks_tab_works_across_modules.details: My Tasks tab shows personal tasks with stats (Total, Assigned to Me, Created by Me, In Progress, Overdue, High Priority) and search input

All_Tasks_defaults_to_Sales_in_Sales_mod.details: Department filter shows 'Sales' when in Sales module

All_Tasks_defaults_to_Production_in_Prod.details: Department filter shows 'Production' when in Production module

All_Tasks_defaults_to_Distribution_in_Di.details: Department filter shows 'Distribution' when in Distribution module

All_Tasks_defaults_to_Marketing_in_Marke.details: Department filter shows 'Marketing' when in Marketing module

New_task_form_department_defaults_to_cur.details: Verified in Sales (shows 'Sales'), Marketing (shows 'Marketing'), and Production (shows 'Production') modules. Assignees section also shows '(from {Department})' label

Manual_department_filter_change_works.details: Department dropdown opens and shows all available departments (Admin, Sales, Production, Marketing, Finance, Distribution, Human Resources, Information Technology, Operations) with checkboxes

Module_switch_updates_department_filter.details: Switching modules via module-selector automatically updates the department filter in All Tasks tab

new_task_dialog_production.png - New task dialog in Production module showing Production as default department
